item.title: Position statement of the spanish working group on crohn's disease and ulcerative colitis (geteccu) on the diagnosis and management of acute severe ulcerative colitis.
item.description: Gastroenterologia y hepatologia - Acute severe ulcerative colitis (ASUC) is a potentially life-threatening medical emergency that requires hospitalization, close multidisciplinary monitoring, and prompt, protocolized decision-makin...

item.title: A Case of Epstein-Barr Virus Associated Smooth Muscle Tumor in the Bronchus of a Child with CARMIL2 Deficiency and a Literature Review.
item.description: Fetal and pediatric pathology - Background: Epstein-Barr virus associated smooth muscle tumors (EBV-SMTs) have been established as a rare neoplasm closely associated with severe immunodeficiency. CARMIL2 deficiency, described in ...

item.title: DOAC Pharmacokinetics in Malabsorptive States.

item.title: Defining Research Priorities in Nutrition and Inflammatory Bowel Disease: Insights from the Nutrition and IBD Research Group.

item.title: Clinical Approaches to Clostridioides difficile Infection Management: Insights From a Nationwide Survey of Korean Physicians.
item.description: Journal of Korean medical science - Clostridioides difficile infection (CDI) remains a significant public health challenge, with variable diagnostic and treatment practices. This study evaluated current clinical practices for CDI dia...

item.title: Potential of Clinical Care-Collected Gut Biopsies for Advancing Personalised Medicine in Inflammatory Bowel Disease.
item.description: United European gastroenterology journal - Review - The management of inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) is challenged by significant patient diversity and a lack of effective profiling tools. This review evaluates the potential of archived formalin-f...

item.title: Assessing data quality of inflammatory bowel disease patients in the All of Us research program.
item.description: JAMIA open - Inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) consists of Crohn's disease (CD) and ulcerative colitis (UC) and is a spectrum autoimmune disease of the gastrointestinal tract. Large scale real-world evidence stu...

item.title: Medication Use and Guideline Adherence in Inflammatory Bowel Disease Management: A Retrospective Study from a Tertiary Care Hospital in Pakistan (2019-2024).
item.description: International journal of general medicine - Inflammatory bowel disease (IBD) remains understudied in Pakistan. This retrospective observational study assessed the management of IBD patients at Shifa International Hospital, Islamabad, from Ja...
